Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); prs=d.get\('purchase_requests',[]\); open_prs=[p for p in prs if p.get\('status'\)=='draft' or p.get\('status'\)=='pending']; print\('total:',len\(prs\),'open:',len\(open_prs\)\); print\('ids:', [p['id'] for p in open_prs[:3]]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); prs=d.get\('purchase_requests',[]\); statuses={}; [statuses.setdefault\(p.get\('status','?'\),[]\).append\(p['id']\) for p in prs]; print\({k:len\(v\) for k,v in statuses.items\(\)}\); import json as j; print\(j.dumps\({k:v[:2] for k,v in statuses.items\(\)},indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d.get\('purchase_requests',[]\)[0]; print\(list\(p.keys\(\)\)\); print\(p\)")
